description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house set within a spacious, landscaped lot. The structure features a dark exterior with a combination of flat and hipped roof sections, and multiple large windows that provide ample natural light. The property includes a driveway leading to a garage, a fenced backyard with a swimming pool, and several outdoor seating areas. The front yard is bordered by hedges and a sidewalk, while the backyard is enclosed by trees and fencing for privacy. The house has a prominent balcony on the upper floor and a covered patio area on the ground level. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a blend of open and private outdoor spaces.
description: A large, modern two-story house with a dark exterior, multiple windows, a garage, balcony, and a backyard pool set in landscaped grounds.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade, balcony, and backyard pool area with surrounding trees and hedges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the fenced backyard, pool, and the expanse of the lawn with trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Street-facing view displaying the driveway, garage, main entrance, and symmetrical front landscaping.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the backyard, pool, patio, and the tall privacy trees lining the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large windows and balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a prominent door, small steps, and a landscaped approach bordered by hedges
